title: dimension lock (server-side)
description: Control if players can enter a specified dimension.
body:
# Dimension Lock

**Dimension Lock** is a pure server-side mod that allows server operators to lock or unlock dimensions for connected clients. (modded and vanilla)

---

## ✨ Features

### ⚙️ Configuration
- Define which dimensions can be locked.
- Customize GUI icons using custom model data.

### 🛠 Commands
- `/dimension` – Opens the GUI to manage dimension locks
    - `/dimension list` – View currently locked dimensions
    - `/dimension lock <dimension>` – Lock a specific dimension
    - `/dimension unlock <dimension>` – Unlock a specific dimension
    - `/dimension unlock-all` – Unlock all currently locked dimensions

### 📜 Logs
- Player gets informed, that the dimension is currently locked.
- Server Operator gets informed that the player has tried to access a certain dimension.
- Server Console gets informed that the player has tried to access a certain dimension.

---

## ⚠️ Notices

### 🔧 Mod Lifetime
This mod was developed for a specific private server and will continue to be maintained at least until that server shuts down.

### 🐞 Reporting Issues
Currently, there's no public issue tracker.  
If you encounter any problems, please email me at **support@greendata.dev** with the subject line:  
`dimension-lock(issue)`.
Any emails with a different subject may be automatically filtered and ignored.
